name: MeetEdgar
highlight_text: Best for creating endless library of content
description:
What Meet Edgar Does

MeetEdgar is a social media scheduler for small businesses and entrepreneurs. It provides an effective way to automatically organize, schedule, and publish content. A standout feature is the nearly infinite  library. Users can easily review and save their content in the library for reuse. 

The automation features allow you to automatically generation and publish your post.

Source: G2

Key Features

  • Meet Edgar can craft, schedule, and organize content for automated publishing.
  • The content recycling feature ensures your content is continually shared for maximum visibility
  • The unlimited library stores endless text, images, and videos.
  • Connects with up to 25 social media accounts, including X, Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, and LinkedIn.

Benefits of Meet Edgar

  • Three benefits stand out for MeetEdgar users: some text
    • Easy organizing and scheduling of content. 
    • Automated publishing 
    • Preservation of content in a “bottomless” library. 
  • Meet Edgar provides hands-on control over your content, including what goes out, when, and where.
  • The automated content recycling feature sets up queues of social posts that will automatically repeat, saving time on creating new content and promoting audience engagement.
  • Re-use of content from the library for new or recycled posts.  

Pricing

Two plans are available: 

  • Eddie Annual plan: USD 299 / year some text
    • Five social accounts  
  • Edgar Annual plan: USD 499 / year  some text
    • 25 social accounts

Pros

✅Bottomless content library  

✅Content creation and automated recycling

✅Quick and caring customer support

Cons

🚫Limited features 

🚫Complex initial setup 

🚫Pricing can be high (considering available features)
